code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut stopped = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n and not stopped
    mut flush = false
    mut ch_byte = 0
    mut has_char = false
    if i == n
      flush = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          flush = true
        else
          ch_byte = b
          has_char = true
        end
      when None
        flush = true
      end
    end
    if flush
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if total + v <= 100
            total = total + v
          else
            stopped = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      if has_char
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(ch_byte)}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
